question.label: Decision feedback
question.name: On key decisions, what feedback are you not getting that would help most?
question.description: Drills into the missing feedback thread to surface the specific gap and what better support would look like.

answer: I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing condition — clear ownership boundaries so Lin is not the default escalation — which is a strong deficiency-as-request on both load and growth support.

new_queue.label: Ownership boundaries
new_queue.name: Where are ownership boundaries still fuzzy right now?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
